heading: Substitution in case of death of claimant
label: 5121A Substitution in case of death of claimant
notes: Effective Date, , , provided that:Pub. L. 110–389, title II, § 212(c)122 Stat. 4151Oct. 10, 2008“, United States Code, as added by subsection (a), shall apply with respect to the claim of any claimant who dies on or after the date of the enactment of this Act [].”Section 5121A of title 38Oct. 10, 2008
amendments: Effective Date, , , provided that:Pub. L. 110–389, title II, § 212(c)122 Stat. 4151Oct. 10, 2008“, United States Code, as added by subsection (a), shall apply with respect to the claim of any claimant who dies on or after the date of the enactment of this Act [].”Section 5121A of title 38Oct. 10, 2008

children.text: If a claimant dies while a claim for any benefit under a law administered by the Secretary, or an appeal of a decision with respect to such a claim, is pending, a living person who would be eligible to receive accrued benefits due to the claimant under may, not later than one year after the date of the death of such claimant, file a request to be substituted as the claimant for the purposes of processing the claim to completion.section 5121(a) of this title
Any person seeking to be substituted for the claimant shall present evidence of the right to claim such status within such time as prescribed by the Secretary in regulations.
Substitution under this subsection shall be in accordance with such regulations as the Secretary may prescribe.

children.heading: .—Limitation
children.label: b .—Limitation
children.text: Those who are eligible to make a claim under this section shall be determined in accordance with .section 5121 of this title
